method.selection: one representative archived crossing/TTC failure from each #1502 failure cluster
method.input_policy: regenerated scenario.yaml and route_overrides.yaml from tracked archive candidate payloads plus committed crossing/TTC template and search-space config

unsupported_rows.row: classic_head_on_corridor guided route search best route
unsupported_rows.reason: tracked #1502 evidence records only a local route_overrides.yaml path; the route override YAML itself is not tracked or regenerable from the compact report

recommendation: continue, but only for crossing/TTC representative failures; promote or regenerate head-on route overrides before treating route-search replay determinism as covered
